proven.claim: Proven: "--model" is documented in help (line 551) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 551
; Proven: "--model" is documented in help (line 551) and consumed by
; getFlag(args, "--model") in runAnalyze, runDerive, runVerify, and buildSignalRegistry.
(declare-const model_documented Int)
(declare-const model_consumed_count Int)
; Line 551 documents --model → documented = 1
(assert (= model_documented 1))
; getFlag(args, "--model") appears in 4 subcommand functions
(assert (= model_consumed_count 4))
; Prove: model IS documented (documented = 1) AND is actively consumed (count > 0)
(assert (not (and (= model_documented 1) (> model_consumed_count 0))))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --model is documented and consumed in 4 functions
